wins: Growth in multiple sport dimensions including men's fitness, men's global football, and men's and women's running footwear
Double-digit growth in Mercurial, Global Football, and G.T. Series in basketball
Positive growth in men's and women's running footwear in Q1
Strong order book for spring '25 footwear units set to grow double digits
Positive consumer engagement with new Running campaign
risks: Retail sales underperformed plan including wholesale partners
Traffic declines across NIKE Direct and partner stores in Greater China
Inventory levels elevated due to promotional activity
Q1 revenue declined 10% on a reported basis
Q2 gross margins expected to decline approximately 150 basis points
